display.summary: Stage current changes, create a commit, push the branch, and open a pull request targeting dev.

options.label: Commit all changes and open a PR
options.purpose: Publish the branch and open a pull request.
options.commandPreview: git add -A; git commit; git push -u origin HEAD; gh pr create --base dev

reasons: Modifies Git history and publishes a branch. Review each command before approval.

session.editText: git add -A; git commit; git push -u origin HEAD; gh pr create --base dev

uiFontFamily: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Oxygen, Ubuntu, Cantarell, sans-serif
